name: The Cracked Rift
description: The perfect circle of scorched glass that floored the Cinder Throne has given way here, splitting along a hairline fracture into a jagged rift that swallows the throne-room's heat whole. Cold pours up out of the break, not the clean chill of winter but a starved, hungry cold that seems to pull warmth toward it rather than push cold out. Below, the fire that ruled the Reaches simply stops, as though a lid has been lifted off the world; what it was covering is a darkness so complete that the eye keeps insisting there must be a floor down there, and keeps being wrong. A stair of fused glass, sheared clean by the crack, descends into the black.
ambient_messages: A thread of cold air climbs out of the rift and the last warmth of the throne-room above thins to nothing.
The hairline crack in the glass ticks and lengthens by a finger's width, and the dark below seems to lean up toward it.
Somewhere far beneath, a silence deepens, as though a sound you never heard has just been swallowed.
